name: Clerk
description: Clerk is a user authentication and management platform for web and mobile applications. It provides a complete Backend API to create, read, update, and delete users, manage sessions, handle organizations and memberships, send invitations, control allowlists, and manage OAuth applications programmatically.

capabilities.name: users_list
capabilities.description: List all users with filtering by email, phone, username, external ID, and pagination support.

capabilities.name: users_create
capabilities.description: Create a new user account with email, phone, username, password, or external credentials.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single user's full profile by their Clerk user ID.

capabilities.name: users_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing user's profile information, metadata, or authentication settings.

capabilities.name: users_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a user and all their associated data.

capabilities.name: users_count
capabilities.description: Count total users matching optional filter criteria.

capabilities.name: users_ban
capabilities.description: Ban a user, preventing them from signing in.

capabilities.name: users_unban
capabilities.description: Remove a ban from a user, re-enabling sign-in.

capabilities.name: users_lock
capabilities.description: Lock a user account, triggering a lockout state.

capabilities.name: users_unlock
capabilities.description: Unlock a previously locked user account.

capabilities.name: users_verify_password
capabilities.description: Verify a user's password without creating a session.

capabilities.name: sessions_list
capabilities.description: List all sessions with optional filtering by client ID or user ID.

capabilities.name: sessions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single session by its ID.

capabilities.name: sessions_revoke
capabilities.description: Revoke a session, effectively signing the user out of that session.

capabilities.name: sessions_verify
capabilities.description: Verify a session token to confirm validity and retrieve session details.

capabilities.name: sessions_create_token
capabilities.description: Create a new JWT token for a session, optionally from a custom template.

capabilities.name: organizations_list
capabilities.description: List all organizations with pagination and optional filtering.

capabilities.name: organizations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new organization with a name and optional settings.

capabilities.name: organizations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single organization by its ID or slug.

capabilities.name: organizations_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing organization's name, slug, or metadata.

capabilities.name: organizations_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an organization and all its associated data.

capabilities.name: organization_memberships_list
capabilities.description: List all memberships for a given organization.

capabilities.name: organization_memberships_create
capabilities.description: Add a user to an organization with a specified role.

capabilities.name: organization_memberships_update
capabilities.description: Update a membership's role within an organization.

capabilities.name: organization_memberships_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a user from an organization.

capabilities.name: organization_invitations_list
capabilities.description: List pending invitations for an organization.

capabilities.name: organization_invitations_create
capabilities.description: Invite a user to an organization by email address.

capabilities.name: organization_invitations_revoke
capabilities.description: Revoke a pending organization invitation.

capabilities.name: invitations_list
capabilities.description: List all application-level invitations with pagination.

capabilities.name: invitations_create
capabilities.description: Create and send an invitation to sign up for your application.

capabilities.name: invitations_revoke
capabilities.description: Revoke a pending application-level invitation.

capabilities.name: allowlist_list
capabilities.description: List all identifiers on the application allowlist.

capabilities.name: allowlist_create
capabilities.description: Add an email or phone number to the application allowlist.

capabilities.name: allowlist_delete
capabilities.description: Remove an identifier from the application allowlist.

capabilities.name: clients_list
capabilities.description: List all clients (browser/device sessions) with pagination.

capabilities.name: clients_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single client by its ID.

capabilities.name: clients_verify
capabilities.description: Verify a client token and return the client object.

capabilities.name: jwks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the JSON Web Key Set (JWKS) for verifying JWTs.

capabilities.name: jwt_templates_list
capabilities.description: List all custom JWT templates configured for your instance.

capabilities.name: jwt_templates_create
capabilities.description: Create a new custom JWT template with specific claims.

capabilities.name: jwt_templates_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single JWT template by its ID.

capabilities.name: jwt_templates_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing JWT template.

capabilities.name: jwt_templates_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a JWT template.

capabilities.name: email_addresses_create
capabilities.description: Create a new email address for a user.

capabilities.name: email_addresses_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single email address by its ID.

capabilities.name: email_addresses_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing email address.

capabilities.name: email_addresses_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an email address from a user.

capabilities.name: phone_numbers_create
capabilities.description: Create a new phone number for a user.

capabilities.name: phone_numbers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single phone number by its ID.

capabilities.name: phone_numbers_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing phone number.

capabilities.name: phone_numbers_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a phone number from a user.

capabilities.name: redirect_urls_list
capabilities.description: List all configured redirect URLs for your instance.

capabilities.name: redirect_urls_create
capabilities.description: Add a new redirect URL to your instance's allowlist.

capabilities.name: redirect_urls_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single redirect URL by its ID.

capabilities.name: redirect_urls_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a redirect URL from your instance.
